# Daily Check Report - Custom XQL Widget

**Dataset**: `panw_ngfw_system_raw`

```sql
dataset = panw_ngfw_system_raw
| filter sub_type = "ha"
| fields _time, log_source_name, severity, event_name, event_description
| sort desc _time
```
